summary: iOS 🟥 INTERMITTENT | Newly connected device not always appear in the app
scenario: Newly paired device intermittently missing from Poly Studio Mobile app device list until app restart
description_clean: INTERMITTENT: Newly connected device does not always appear in the app's device list. After pairing a new device and returning to the app, the headset is sometimes missing from the list and only appears after restarting the app. Reproduced with multiple devices (Focus 2, Legend 30, Voyager 6200). Additionally, turning on a device already displayed in the app does not always update its status to "connected." Expected: All connected devices appear properly in the app.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, ensure no devices are currently connected.
3. Put a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Focus 2, Legend 30, or Voyager 6200) into pairing mode by pressing and holding the Bluetooth button.
4. On the Android device, go to Settings → Bluetooth and pair the device.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
6. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
7. If the device appears, tap on the device name to enter Device Settings.
8. Turn off the device by pressing the Power button.
9. Return to the Home screen and observe the device status.
10. Turn on the device again by pressing the Power button.
11. Observe whether the device status updates to 'Connected' on the Home screen.
expected: All connected devices appear properly in the app's device list on the Home screen. Turning on a device already displayed in the app updates its status to "Connected" immediately.
actual: After pairing a new device and returning to the app, the headset is sometimes missing from the device list and only appears after restarting the app. Additionally, turning on a device already displayed in the app does not always update its status to "Connected."
